hadiths.en:
Imam Ali ibn Al-Hussain {a.s} said: 
"A man may spend his wealth on what is right, yet still be considered extravagant." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.167 • Al-Wafi, Vol.17 p.84 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.65 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3623
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٢٣

hadiths.ar: 3625 - وَّ رَّوَّى إ َّن ُّو هِس َّامٍ إَّلْن َّصْزِى  ُّ عَّن ْ إَّلزِّص َّا عَّ إ َّن  َّهُّ ق َّال وَّ طَّزْحُّ إَّلن  َّوَّى
hadiths.en:
Al-Asbagh ibn Nubata narrated from Commander of the Faithful {a.s} that he 
said: 
"The extravagant person has three signs: he eats what does not belong to him, buys 
what does not belong to him, and wears what does not belong to him."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.167 • Al-Khisal, Vol.1 p.97 • Al-Wafi, Vol.17 p.85 • Wasa’il 
Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.65 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.72 p.303 • Tafsir Nur Al-Thaqalayn, Vol.1 p.772 • Tafsir Kanz Al-
Daqaiq, Vol.4 p.462 • Mustadrak Al-Wasa’il, Vol.15 p.270 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3624
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٢٤

hadiths.ar:
3626   -  وَّ سَّا َّلَّ إ ِسْحَّاق ُّ ن ْن ُّ عَّم َّارٍ إ َّن َّا عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ : عَّن ْ إ َّذْن َّى إَّلْأ ِسْزَّإف ِ ق َّق َّال ن ِك َّ ي َّن ْي َّذ ِلُّهُّ وَّ ق َّص ْلُّ  
إَّلْأ ِن َّاءِ ي ُّهَّزِي ق ُّهُّ وَّ ق َّذ ْق ُّك َّ إَّلن  َّوَّى هَّكَّذ َّإ وَّ هَّكَّذ َّإ
hadiths.en:
Abu Hisham al -Basri narrated from Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar -Ridha {a.s} that he 
said:  
"Among the causes of corruption are the discontinuation of currency (dirham and 
dinar) and the discarding of date pits." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.167 • Al-Wafi, Vol.17 p.85 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.5 p.52 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3625
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٢٥

hadiths.ar:
3627  -  وَّ رَّوَّى إَّلْوَّلِي ذُّ ن ْن ُّ صَّن ِي حٍ عَّن ِ إَّلص َّاذِق ِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ إ َّن  َّهُّ ق َّال   إ َّوْ ق َّالَّ  
«ا َّن ْق َّق َّهُّ ق ِى  وُّج ُّوهِهِ ق َّي َّق ُّولُّ إَّلل َّهُّم 
إُّرْر ُّق ْن ِى  ق َّي َّق ُّولُّ إَّلل َّهُّ ي َّعَّالَّى إ َّ لَّمْ إ َّرْر ُّق ْك َّ وَّ رَّج ُّل  إ َّمْسَّك َّ عَّن ِ إَّلط َّلَّث ِ ق َّي َّق ُّولُّ إَّلل َّهُّم َّ إُّرْر ُّق ْن ِ ى  ق َّي َّق ُّولُّ إَّلل َّهُّ ي َّعَّالَّى إ َّ لَّمْ إ َّج ْعَّلْ  
لَّك َّ إَّلس َّن ِي لَّ إ ِلَّى إَّلط َّلَّث ِ وَّ   رَّج ُّل  كَّان َّث ْ عِن ْذَّةُّ إِمْزَّإ َّة   ق َّق َّالَّ إَّلل َّهُّم َّ ق َّزِّق ْ ن َّي ْن ِى  وَّ ن َّي ْن َّهَّا ق َّي َّق ُّولُّ إَّلل َّهُّ عَّز  َّ وَّ ج َّل َّ إ َّ لَّمْ   إ َّج ْعَّلْ 
ذ َّلِك َّ إ ِلَّي ْك
hadiths.en:
Ishaq ibn Ammar asked Abu Abdullah {a.s} about the least form of 
extravagance.  
Imam {a.s} replied: "Wearing your garment of dignity for ordinary tasks, spilling the 
excess of what is in your vessel, and carelessly throwing away date pits like this and 
that." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.167 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3626
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٢٦

hadiths.en:
Al-Walid ibn Sabih narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} that 
he said: 
"Three people make supplications, but their prayers are not answered"  - or he said: 
“their prayers are returned to them": 
A man who had a large amount of wealth, reaching thirty thousand or forty thousand, 
and spent it without careful consideration. Then he says, 'O Allah {SWT}, provide for me.' 
Allah {SWT}, the Exalted, says, 'Did I not provide for you?' 
A man who refrains from seeking sustenance and says, 'O Allah {SWT}, provide for me.' 
Allah {SWT}, the Exalted, says, 'Did I not make a way for you to seek provision?'  
A man who had a wife and prays, 'O Allah {SWT}, separate me from her.' Allah {SWT}, the 
Almighty, says, 'Did I not give you the authority to handle this matter yourself?'"  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.168 • Al-Wafi, Vol.17 p.26 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3627
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٢٧

hadiths.ar: 3629 - وَّ ق َّالَّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم ن ِالْمَّزْءِ إ ِي ْماً إ َّن ْ ي ُّص َّي ِّغَّ مَّن ْ ي َّعُّول
hadiths.en:
Imam {a.s} said: "Part of a man's happiness is that he is the caretaker of his 
family." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.168 • Al-Wafi, Vol.17 p.98 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.68 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3628
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٢٨

hadiths.en:
Imam {a.s} said: "It is sufficient for a man to be sinful if he neglects those he is 
responsible for." 
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol.4 p.12 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.168 • Uddat Al-Da’i, Vol.1 p.82 • Al-
Wafi, Vol.10 p.437 • Al-Wafi, Vol.17 p.98 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.68 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.21 p.542 • 
Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.100 p.13 • Mustadrak Al-Wasa’il, Vol.14 p.252 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3629
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٢٩

hadiths.en:
The Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) said:  
"Cursed, cursed is the one who neglects those he is responsible for." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.168 • Uddat Al-Da’i, Vol.1 p.82 • Al-Wafi, Vol.17 p.98 • 
Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.68 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3630
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٣٠

hadiths.ar:
3632  -  وَّ رَّوَّى إ ِسْمَّاعِي لُّ ن ْن ُّ ج َّان ِزٍ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ إ َّن  َّهُّ ق َّال وق ِ، ق َّا ِذ َّإ لَّز ِمَّي ْكُّمْ  
ق َّاصْن ِزُّوإ لَّهَّا
hadiths.en:
Imam {a.s} said: "The one who strives to provide for his family through lawful 
means is like a warrior in the path of Allah {SWT}." 
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol.5 p.88 • Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.168 • Uddat Al -Da’i, Vol.1 p.82 • 
Awali Al-La’ali, Vol.1 p.268 • Awali Al-La’ali, Vol.2 p.109 • Awali Al-La’ali, Vol.3 p.199 • Al-Wafi, Vol.17 p.97 
• Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.66 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.97 p.7 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.100 p.13 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3631
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٣١

hadiths.ar: 3633 - وَّ ق َّالَّ إَّلزِّص َّا عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم لِأ ِج ْوَّإن ِك َّ مِن ْ ن َّق ْسِك َّ مَّا ص َّزَّرُّةُّ عَّلَّي ْك َّ إ َّكْي َّزُّ مِن ْ ن َّق ْعِهِ لَّهُّمْ
hadiths.en:
Isma'il bin Jabir narrated from Abu Abdillah {a.s} that he said:  
"Do not expose yourselves to obligations, but if they become binding upon you, then 
be patient with them." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.168 • Al -Wafi, Vol.17 p.98 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol.16 
p.327 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol.18 p.428 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol.23 p.304 • Al -Fusul Al-Muhimmah, Vol.2 
p.276 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3632
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٣٢

hadiths.ar:
3634 - وَّ رَّوَّى عُّمَّزُّ ن ْن ُّ ي َّز ِي ذَّ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ إ َّن  َّه ق َّال 
سُّوءٍ إ ِن  َّهُّ مَّن ْ كَّسِلَّ لَّمْ ي ُّو َّذِّ جَّق  اً وَّ مَّن ْ ص َّح ِزَّ لَّمْ ي َّصْن ِزْ عَّلَّى جَّق
hadiths.en:
Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha {a.s} said: 
"Do not give to your brothers from yourself what causes you more harm than it benefits 
them." 
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol.4 p.32 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.168 • Al-Wafi, Vol.10 p.461 • Wasa’il 
Al-Shi’ah, Vol.16 p.316 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.16 p.316 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3633
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٣٣

hadiths.ar:
3635  -  وَّ ق َّالَّ إ َّن ُّو إَّلْحَّسَّن ِ مُّوسَّى ن ْن ُّ ج َّعْق َّزٍ عَّلَّي ْهِمَّا إَّلس َّلاَّم و َّإمَّ إ ِن  َّ إَّلل َّهَّ ي َّعَّالَّى 
لَّي ُّن ْع ِض ُّ إَّلْعَّن ْذَّ إَّلْق َّارِع
hadiths.en:
Abu Abdillah {a.s} said: 
"Beware of laziness and restlessness, for they are the keys to every evil. Indeed, 
whoever is lazy will not fulfill a right, and whoever is restless will not endure upon the 
truth." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.168 • Al-Wafi, Vol.17 p.75 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.61 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3634
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٣٤

hadiths.ar: 3636 - وَّ ق َّال إَّلص َّاذِق ُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ لِن َّس ِي زٍ إَّلن  َّن  َّالِ
hadiths.en:
Abu al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim {a.s} said: "Indeed, Allah {SWT} the 
Exalted hates a servant who sleeps excessively. Indeed, Allah {SWT} the Exalted hates a 
servant who is idle." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.169 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.58 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3635
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٣٥

hadiths.ar:
3637  - وَّ رَّوَّى إ ِسْحَّاق ُّ ن ْن ُّ عَّم َّارٍ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ق َّال   صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ  
وَّ إ لِهِ إَّلْحُّزْق َّه َّ ق َّق َّال ه
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} said to Bishir al-Nabbal: 
"When you are granted provision from something, remain committed to it."  
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol.5 p.168 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.169 • Shihab Al-Akhbar, Vol.1 p.151 
• Tahdhib Al -Ahkam, Vol. 7 p.14 • Al -Wafi, Vol. 17 p.424 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol. 17 p.441 • Al -Fusul Al -
Muhimmah, Vol.2 p.248 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3636
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٣٦

hadiths.ar:
3638 - وَّ ق َّالَّ إَّلص َّاذِق ُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم  ق َّق ِي لَّ ص َّزْب ُّ إ َّى ِّ  
س َّى ْءٍ ق َّق َّال
hadiths.en:
Ishaq ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-
Sadiq {a.s}: 
A man complained to the Messenger of Allah {SWT} (peace and blessings be upon him 
and his family) about trade.  
The Prophet said: “Look for merchandise, purchase it, and then sell it. Whatever you 
profit from it, remain committed to it." 
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol.5 p.168 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.169 • Awali Al-La’ali, Vol.3 p.201 • 
Al-Wafi, Vol.17 p.423 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.440 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3637
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٣٧

hadiths.ar:
3639  -  وَّ رُّوِى َّ عَّن ِ إَّلْأ َّرْق َّظِ ق َّالَّ ق َّالَّ إ َّن ُّو عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم 
ذَّق َّان ِق ِ إَّلْأ َّس ْي َّاءِ ن ِن َّق ْسِك َّ ق َّا ِن  َّهُّ لأَّ ي َّن ْن َّع ِى  لِلْمَّزْءِ إَّلْمُّسْلِمِ ذ ِى  إَّلذِّي ن ِ وَّ إَّلْحَّسَّث ِ إ َّن ْ ي َّلِى َّ س ِ زَّإءَّ ذَّق َّان ِق ِ إَّلْأ َّس ْي َّاءِ ن ِن َّ ق ْسِهِ مَّا  
ج َّلاَّ ي َّلاَّي َّه َّ إ َّس ْي َّاءَّ ق َّا ِن  َّهُّ ي َّن ْن َّع ِى  لِذ ِى  إَّلذِّي ن ِ وَّ إَّلْحَّسَّث ِ إ َّن ْ ي َّلِي َّهَّا ن ِن َّق ْسِهِ إَّلْعَّق َّارَّ وَّ إَّلْأ ِن ِ لَّ وَّ إَّلز َّق ِي ق
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} said: 
"Handle your major affairs personally, and delegate the smaller ones to others."  
It was asked: “What kind of tasks are you referring to?" 
Imam {a.s} replied: “Matters like buying and selling properties and similar transactions." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.169 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3638
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٣٨

hadiths.ar:
3640  -  وَّ رَّوَّى هِس َّامُّ ن ْن ُّ سَّالِمٍ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ق َّال إ َّمِي زُّ إَّلْمُّو ْمِن ِي ن َّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ي َّحْي َّطِث ُّ وَّ 
ي َّسْي َّق ِى  وَّ ي َّكْن ُّسُّ وَّ كَّان َّث ْ ق َّاطِمَّه ُّ عَّلَّي ْهَّا إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ي َّطْحَّن ُّ وَّ ي َّعْح ِن ُّ وَّ ي َّح ْن ِز
hadiths.en:
It is narrated from Al-Arqat that Abu Abdillah {a.s} said: 
"Do not spend your time wandering through markets, nor personally handle the 
purchase of minor goods. It does not befit a Muslim who possesses faith and honor to 
involve himself directly in purchasing small items - except in three matters.  
It is proper for a man of faith and dignity to personally handle these three matters: 
buying real estate, camels, and slaves." 
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol.5 p.91 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.169 • Al-Wafi, Vol.17 p.78 • Wasa’il 
Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.73 • Al-Fusul Al-Muhimmah, Vol.3 p.386 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3639

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٣٩

hadiths.ar: 3641 - وَّ ق َّال إَّلص َّاذِق ُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم
hadiths.en:
Hisham ibn Salim narrated from Abu Abdillah {a.s} who said: 
"Commander of the Faithful {a.s} used to gather firewood, draw water, and sweep, while 
Sayiida Fatimah {s.a} used to grind, knead, and bake." 
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol.5 p.86 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.169 • Al-Amali (Lil-Tusi), Vol.1 p.660 
• Al-Manaqib, Vol.2 p.104 • Majmu’at Warram, Vol.2 p.79 • Awali Al-La’ali, Vol.3 p.200 • Al-Wafi, Vol.17 p.77 
• Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.40 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.62 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.20 p.222 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3640

hadiths.ar:
3642  -  وَّ رَّوَّى ر ُّرَّإرَّة ُّ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ق َّال   عَّلَّي ْهِ مِن َّ إَّلْمَّالِ 
إَّلص َّامِث ِ لَّهُّ كَّي ْف َّ ي َّصْن َّغُّ ق َّال
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} said: 
"The buyer of real estate is blessed, while the seller of real estate is deprived."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.169 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3641
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,

hadiths.ar:
3643  -  ورَّوَّى عَّن ْذُّ إَّلص َّمَّذِ ن ْن ُّ ن َّس ِي زٍ عَّن ْ مُّعَّاوِي َّه َّ ن ْن ِ عَّم َّارٍ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ق َّال لَّم َّا ذَّج َّلَّ رَّسُّولُّ  
إَّلل َّهِ صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ إَّلْمَّذِي ن َّه َّ ج َّظ َّ ذُّورَّهَّا ن ِزِج ْلِهِ ي ُّم َّ ق َّال مَّن ْ ن َّاعَّ رُّق ْعَّه ً مِن ْ إ َّرْض ٍ ق َّلاَّ ي ُّن َّارِك ْ ق ِي هِ
hadiths.en:
Zurara narrated from Abu Abdillah {a.s}: "A man does not leave behind anything 
more burdensome upon him than silent wealth (hoarded wealth)."  
I asked him, "What should he do with it?" 
Imam {a.s} replied: “Invest it in walls, orchards, and houses." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.170 • Kashf Al-Muhajjah, Vol.1 p.180 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, 
Vol.17 p.69 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3642
